_comment: Intentional doc references the staleness scanner (pnpm docs:staleness) should NOT flag. `paths` = repo-path tokens that resolve to no file/dir on purpose (illustrative example paths in docs). `symbols` = referenced identifiers that intentionally do not exist as a src/ export yet (planned APIs, prose examples). Each entry needs a reason; the scanner is advisory (weekly sync-drift canary) so this list absorbs deliberate references, not real drift. Keep it shrinking toward zero.

paths.reason: AGENTS.md documents this symlink is intentionally absent (Claude Code follows CLAUDE.md).
